title: Galley-La Inspects the Merry
description: The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Kaku. The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wow! Water seven is so cool!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Yeah! Let's go find ship mechanics!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Hey! You can't anchor your ship there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What are you here for? Robbery?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Hey! What are you doing, stupid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: and find the man named iceberg.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: We'll ask him to fix our ship.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Hey!! There's pirate trouble at dock 1!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I don't know what you meant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I meant exactly what I said. Hahah.

summary: The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.
